blocks.body: Question Forms (question forms) are the basics of how to correctly construct question sentences in English. You will learn the main types of questions, the order of words and the rules for using auxiliary verbs to form questions.

{ "title": "10. Brief synopsis", "items": [ "Inversion is an auxiliary verb before the subject in questions.", "Yes/No Questions are general questions with the answer "yes" or "no".", "Wh-Questions are special questions with what, where, when, why, who, how.", "Do/Does/Did - auxiliary verbs for Simple Tenses (with main verbs).", "With to be - inversion without do/does/did: Are you...? Was she...?", "With modals - inversion without do/does/did: Can you...? Will she...?", "Subject Question — Who/What as subject, without do/does/did: Who called?", "Basic rule — always inversion of auxiliary verb and subject!", "Formula — Wh-word + Auxiliary + Subject + Main Verb + ...?" ] }
